title: Dark Brown 4L Creocote
description: Product description SIZE: STYLE/COLOUR: NOTES: Directions 1. Prepare the wood surface by cleaning it and sanding it lightly. 2. Apply the stain using a brush or sponge, working in the direction of the wood grain. 3. Allow the stain to penetrate the wood for the recommended time (usually 5-15 minutes). 4. Wipe off any excess stain with a clean cloth. 5. Allow the stain to dry completely (usually 2-4 hours). 6. Apply a sealant or topcoat if desired for added protection.
